faqs.question: What types of flies are most common in Forest Hills homes?
faqs.answer: Forest Hills residents typically encounter house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, and occasionally cluster flies. House flies are common near restaurants along Austin Street, while fruit flies often appear in kitchens during summer. Drain flies breed in organic matter in pipes, and cluster flies may enter homes near Forest Park in fall seeking warmth.
